The '''arqet''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] [[Diet/Legends|carnivores]] and predatory [[ungulate]]s native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pellastrallas]]. A ferocious and patient hunter, arqets were utilized for gladiatorial combat by the [[Circus Horrificus/Legends|Circus Horrificus]], leading to chaos after one escaped and gored numerous spectators on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].

==Biology and appearance==
Arqets were [[Blood/Legends|warm-blooded]] predators with rigid hides comprised of dense dorsal and spinal plates capable of withstanding energy projectiles and slug-throwing weapons.<ref name="CotG" /> These ridges gave them the appearance of [[armadillo]]s.<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> The animal's skin varied in hue depending on the amount of [[Star/Legends|solar]] radiation they were exposed to, and allowed the arqet to blend into its surroundings. An arqet's [[Bone/Legends|skull]] was flanked by two curved horns longer than the head itself, which were used to hunt and kill prey along with their sharp, piercing [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. They also had split hoofs ending in claws capable of inflicting damage, and were typically sure-footed in their rocky habitats.<ref name="CotG" />

They were solitary hunters, and preyed on smaller species of their region including the [[Ixzinian rock ram]] and the [[Uthori breix]]. Known for their legendary patience, arqets remained motionless to the point of appearing as immobile as a standing rock. Staying hidden until their prey came within range, arqets attacked at the last minute, skewering smaller creatures with their horns. They were also known to lure victims in by taking damage, then lunging upon their unsuspecting attackers.<ref name="CotG" />

==History==
Arqets inhabited the [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] ranges of [[Pellastrallas]], preying on smaller [[Species/Legends|species]] including the [[Ixzinian rock ram]] and the [[Uthori breix]]. They were infamous as one of the most ferocious [[Blood/Legends|warm-blooded]] predators in the [[Agarix sector/Legends|Agarix sector]], and their extreme patience while hunting became legendary. Some arqets were targeted by armed [[Humanoid/Legends|Humanoids]], and were able to take hits from energy and slug-thrown weapons in order to dissuade their attackers, or to lure them into range for a last, desperate lunge.<ref name="CotG" />

The [[Circus Horrificus/Legends|Circus Horrificus]] captured ferocious arqets from their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] to be used in gladiatorial arenas alongside beasts such as [[Akk dog/Legends|akk dogs]].<ref name="MF">[[Millennium Falcon (novel)|''Millennium Falcon'']]</ref> Perhaps the most famous instance of this was the importation of an arqet by the Circus in [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa's]] [[Ko Hentota]] district in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. When the arqet was revealed to the crowd, it promptly shook off its restraints and began to attack the spectators, killing twelve. Attempts to subdue it were futile, and the beast fled into the ventilation system. The disaster caused the operators of the [[Circus/Legends|Circus]] to scatter and marked the end of its illegal shows.<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52|regional/13418_3.html|Circus Horrificus Turns Horrific}}</ref>
